tasks.title: Identify the bookworm package providing libintl.so
tasks.detail: Run `apt-file search libintl.so` (or `docker run --rm rust:1.96-bookworm sh -c 'apt-get update && apt-cache search gettext'`) to confirm the exact package. Candidates: libgettextpo-dev, gettext. Do not guess the name.

tasks.title: Add the package to the pgcron builder stage only
tasks.detail: images/postgres18/Dockerfile, the apt-get install at line ~92 inside `FROM rust:1.96-bookworm AS pgcron`. Do NOT touch the anvil or pgnet stages.

tasks.title: Verify amd64 build succeeds locally
tasks.detail: docker build --platform=linux/amd64 -f images/postgres18/Dockerfile . — must exit 0 and produce pg_cron.so. This is the acceptance gate.

tasks.title: Verify arm64 build still succeeds (no regression)
Confirm CI amd64 leg goes green and multi-arch manifest runs
tasks.detail: Push, then `gh run list --workflow=postgres-image.yml`. The `Build and push linux/amd64` job must reach success and `Create multi-arch manifest` must run rather than skip.
